sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83850" key="plhsi/moxqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλησί-μοχθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83850.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of distress,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τλησίμοχθος</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
